System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference SVS470_00.01.12_SVS470_000527.ddt_20170301T121303.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 644
Receive ID 5C4
Functional Addr E8
Functional Name SVS
